description: Implement the resource management system for oxygen, power cell, and suit integrity. Each resource depletes from specific actions/conditions and has consequences at zero, creating ongoing tension throughout each run.
acceptance_criteria: Oxygen decreases by 1 unit per turn. The player starts each run with 100 O2.
Given the player's oxygen reaches 0, when a turn passes, then the player takes 5 HP damage per turn (suffocation).
Power cell decreases when using powered equipment (flashlight, powered weapons, hacking). The player starts with 100 power.
Given power cell reaches 0, when the player attempts to use powered equipment, then the action fails and a 'no power' message appears.
Suit integrity decreases from combat damage and environmental hazards (fire, acid). The player starts with 100 suit.
Given suit integrity reaches 0, when the player enters a hazardous room (toxic, vacuum), then they take double environmental damage.
Resource bars are displayed in the HUD panel and update in real-time after each turn.
O2 canisters, power cells, and repair kits can be picked up to restore resources.
notes: Spec table defines 4 resources but inventory space is handled in the equipment story. Start with O2/Power/Suit for MVP. Exact depletion rates are tunable — start with these defaults and balance via playtesting.
